burden.dalyPerCapita: high per-case disability; requires ICU in severe cases
burden.mortalityRate: Low to moderate (3-7% in severe cases)

vulnerablePopulations: patients with recent GI or respiratory infection
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Progressive symmetric weakness and areflexia; CSF albuminocytologic dissociation; EMG/NCS support diagnosis

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; improves with early IVIG or plasmapheresis

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Neurology evaluation in tertiary hospitals; EMG availability varies
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: IVIG or plasmapheresis; respiratory monitoring and ICU support when needed
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access to ICU beds and IVIG in some regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Established neurology centers and protocols for acute management
